summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.xml; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.ICharacterScanner; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.IToken; import org.eclipse.jface.text.rules.MultiLineRule; public class TagRule extends MultiLineRule { public TagRule(IToken token) { super("<", ">", token); } @Override protected boolean sequenceDetected(ICharacterScanner scanner, char[] sequence, boolean eofAllowed) { int c = scanner.read(); if (sequence[0] == '<') { if (c == '?') { scanner.unread(); return false; } if (c == '!') { scanner.unread();
